Advisor: Got it. And on taxes—do you have a sense of what bracket you tend to land in these days? Doesn’t have to be perfect.

Advisor: Hi Jennife, hi David—nice to meet you both. I’m Alex. Before we get into numbers, what made you decide to sit down and do planning now?
Client 1: Hi Alex. We just want a clear plan—like, are we saving enough and not doing anything dumb tax-wise.
Client 2: Yeah, and honestly just something we can stick to month to month without thinking too hard.

Advisor: Perfect—thank you, Jennife. David, totally normal—those brackets are confusing. I’ll note 35%.
